The '''firethorn tree''' was a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Tree/Legends|tree]] found on [[Abbaji (Spar sector)|Abbaji]].<ref name="CSWE" />

==Biology==
The [[Tree/Legends|trees]] grew only in a single, small grove of the [[Irugian Rain Forest]], and could reach over a hundred [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in height.

==History==
Tiny versions were owned by the rich across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] as heirlooms. These were worth a decamillion [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]] had a 600-[[Standard year/Legends|year]]-old specimen given to him by a former rival to make amends. It was only trimmed once a year, with one small cut per trim.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire (novel)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire'' novel]] {{1st|in book}}
